tickets.title: Add JWT refresh token rotation
tickets.description: Implement refresh-token rotation so access tokens expire after 15 minutes but sessions stay alive silently.

comments.author: sam
comments.text: PR up — rotation logic is in auth/tokens.go. Need a second pair of eyes on the revocation path.

comments.author: alex
comments.text: Left review comments. Mostly minor — one concern about the revocation race condition.

tickets.title: Fix mobile nav overflow on small screens
tickets.description: The top nav wraps onto two lines below 375 px viewport width, overlapping the page hero.

comments.author: alex
comments.text: Fixed by switching to a hamburger menu below 400 px. Tested on iPhone SE and Galaxy S8.
